title: Orbital Strike Cannon
description: Orbital TNT Rod adds a powerful custom fishing rod that calls down a devastating orbital TNT strike from the sky.
body:
Orbital TNT Rod adds a powerful custom fishing rod that calls down a devastating orbital TNT strike from the sky.

Right-click to target a location and unleash a massive bombardment made of three large TNT rings with a vertical center stack, creating a spectacular rain of explosives. The rod always displays an enchanted glint, consumes durability on use, and has a 9-second cooldown to keep the destruction under control.

Unlock the crafting recipe by completing the Orbital Strike advancement, then repair the rod using a Nether Star in an anvil.

Perfect for players who want a fun, chaotic late-game weapon that turns any location into a crater.
